title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: David Thomas & Andrew Hunt
takeaway: Every piece of knowledge must have a single, unambiguous, authoritative representation.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
takeaway: You are not the rational agent you think you are — and that's fascinating.

title: Zero to One
author: Peter Thiel
takeaway: Competition is for losers. Monopoly is the engine of capitalist profit.

title: Deep Work
author: Cal Newport
takeaway: The ability to focus without distraction is the superpower of the 21st century.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
takeaway: A political ecology sci-fi epic that predicted the oil crisis, colonialism, and messianism.
